testcase.name: [1:7] Get user by id
[2:15] Get todos by userId and validate done: TRUE

failure.message:
>>>> js failed: 01: TRUE <<<< org.graalvm.polyglot.PolyglotException: ReferenceError: "TRUE" is not defined - <js>.:program(Unnamed:1)
classpath:com/example/karate/BasicAPIGet.feature:20
